title: TMC ACTREC Staff Nurse Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
organization: Advanced Centre for Treatment Research and Education in Cancer (TMC ACTREC)
short_info: Advanced Centre for Treatment Research and Education in Cancer (TMC ACTREC) Staff Nurse Notification 2026 has been released on the official website actrec.gov.in. A recruitment notification has been announced through the TMC ACTREC Staff Nurse Recruitment 2026 for Staff Nurse posts on a contract basis.

age_limit.details: Staff Nurse: Maximum age limit is 35 years.

qualification.education_qualification: B.Sc. (Nursing) with one year clinical experience.
qualification.details: Staff Nurse: General Nursing and Midwifery and / OR B.Sc. (Nursing) with preferably one year clinical experience. Candidates should have a valid Maharashtra Nursing Council (MNC) Registration certificate. Hepatitis 'B' Vaccination (all doses) Certificate is compulsory.

salary_details.staff nurse (experience): Additional Rs. 1,500/- (Rupees One Thousand Five Hundred only) for every completed year of experience.

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for this recruitment is Staff Nurse. This is a contract-based position at TMC ACTREC.

faq.question: Q2. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview in person with all required documents.

faq.question: Q3. What is the walk-in date for the Staff Nurse position?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Staff Nurse position is scheduled for 04th June 2026. Candidates are advised to reach the venue on time.

faq.question: Q4. What are the educational qualifications required for the Staff Nurse post?
faq.answer: Candidates should possess a B.Sc. (Nursing) degree with at least one year of clinical experience. General Nursing and Midwifery is also accepted.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for the Staff Nurse position?
faq.answer: The age limit for the Staff Nurse position is that candidates should not exceed 35 years of age.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Staff Nurse role?
faq.answer: The salary offered ranges from Rs. 33,000 to Rs. 35,000 per month, with additional pay for experience.

faq.question: Q7. Where is the walk-in interview venue?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at KS Auditorium, Gr. Floor, Khanolkar Shodhika, TMC-ACTREC, Sec-22, Kharghar, Navi Mumbai- 410210.

faq.question: Q8. What documents are required for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Required documents include Bio-data, photograph, Aadhar Card, PAN CARD, original and self-attested copies of qualification and experience certificates, MNC registration, and Hepatitis 'B' vaccination certificate.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q10. What is the reporting time for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: The reporting time for the walk-in interview is from 09:30 a.m. to 10:00 a.m. on the interview date.
